name: clawd-remote-codex
description: Runs in VS Code remote workspaces and forwards Codex session activity back to the local Clawd bridge.

clawd.remoteCodex.enabled.description: Enable Clawd monitoring for Codex sessions running in VS Code remote workspaces such as devcontainers.

clawd.remoteCodex.pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for remote Codex JSONL session logs.

clawd.remoteCodex.sessionDirCandidates.description: Additional remote directories to probe for Codex session logs. Each value may be a home directory such as /home/vscode or a full sessions path such as /home/vscode/.codex/sessions.
